inbound_signal: Independent cleanup validation accepted six claims but found no executable multiple-settlement AggregateError case and confirmed the current cleanup wall at 1 against 0.
decision_delta: Opened a blocking breaking flag, dispatched only the missing read-only error-aggregation proof, and kept the future correction constrained to a recorded 1-to-0 remediation corridor.
expected_effect: Complete the cleanup contract without allowing the existing branch breach to become an exception or a reason to weaken the wall.
evidence_delta: Ten cleanup cases and seven arbitration behaviors replay; multiple-settlement aggregation reads 0 against 1; current cleanup mutation reads 1 against 0; objective remains 0 of 16.
problem_restatement: Prove the complete SDK deactivation contract, then permit only the correction that removes implicit finish from cleanup and directly returns the wall to zero.
alternatives_considered: Treat one-error propagation as sufficient for an AggregateError claim
Proceed with product edits because the intended fix is obvious
Open breaking, add the missing case, and record a narrow resolution before any edit
assumptions_at_risk: Multiple failed settlements can be joined and reported deterministically
A narrow remediation can reduce the breached metric without changing another wall
The breaking resolution can remain inside the existing action envelope and threshold
dkr_decision: Continue the DKR-1 v3 proof and independent validation; no CKR or PKR promotion and no product edit while the breaking flag is open without a recorded resolution corridor.

hallucination_sweep.claim: The ten-case replay already proves multiple-error aggregation.
hallucination_sweep.verdict: rejected; it exercises one rejected settlement only

missing_context_sweep.claim: A discovered fix is automatically authorized through a breached wall.
missing_context_sweep.verdict: rejected; only read-only proof is active and a separate recorded resolution is required

unexpected_results.claim: The lifecycle design mostly held, but its strongest error-policy sentence lacked a matching case.

anti_goal_violation_review.claim: cleanup_business_state_mutation_count is breached in the current product baseline.
